titleStmt.title: SII 9.371: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 371. (A.R. No. 525 of 1914.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT YENIGI, HADAGALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated the 13th year of the reign of the Yādava king Kandharadēva, Śaka 1181, Kāḷayukta, Pushya, Amāvāse, Sōmavāra, Uttarāyaṇa,-saṅkarānti, Sūrya-grahaṇa, Vyatīpāta. “There is a curious error in this date. In Kāḷayukti (= A.D. 1258-59, Śaka 1181 current) the month Pausha was Kshaya i.e., suppressed and there could have been no Pushya Amāvāsyā in that year, nor did any Amāvāsyā that could possibly correspond to ordinary Pushya Amāvāsyā fall in that year on Monday.” It records that, while the king was camping at the nelevīḍu of Dēvagiri, the 120 Brāhman Mahājanas of Pūvina-Paḍaṅgile, who are described as very learned in the Vēdas and the Śāstras, performing Aupāsana and Agnihōtra and as “ripukula-kadalī-vana-kuñjarar and śaraṇāgata-vajra-pañjarar,” that is to say, destructive to enemies as elephants to the forest of plantain-trees, and mail-armour to those who seek shelter under them, made a gift of various plots of land of specified boundary, for the service of the god Kusmanātha at the village. Pūvina-Paḍaṅgile is stated to have been situated in the Kōgaḷi-nāḍu, which was the eye of the Noḷambavāḍi-nāḍu which again was, as it were, the nose of Kuntala-dēśa. It is no wonder that, as required by the times, the Brāhmans of those days were ready to take up arms.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē . śrīvanitāpriyanutanagajāvallabhaniṁduśēkharaṁ kusumē
saṁ pūvinapaḍaṁgileya viprāvaḷigīgabhimatārtthasaṁkuḷamaṁ . © svasti śamadhigatapaṁcama
hāśabda dvārāvatīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ viṣṇuvaṁśōdbhavaṁ suvarṇnagaruḍadhvajaṁ yādavakuḷakamaḷakaḷikāvikāsa
bhāskaraṁ Arirāyajagajhaṁpammāḷavarāyamadanatriṇētraṁ gūrjjararāyabhayaṁkaraṁ teluṁgarāyasthā
panācārya yityādināmālaṁkritaṁ śrīmatu prauḍhapratāpacakravartti śrīkaṁdhāradēvavijayarājya
da varṣa 12 nneraḍaneya piṁgaḷasaṁvatsarada dēvagiryya nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyutta
mire . vṛtta . jalanidhivēṣṭitāvaniyoḷoppuva kuṁtaḷadēṣadoḷmanaṁgoḷipa mukhakke nāsikavenippavolappa
noṇaṁbavāḍināḍoḷagidu driṣṭi tānenipa kōgaḷināḍoḷagagrahāramaggaḷikeyanāṁta pūvinapa
ḍaṁgile raṁjipudentu nōrppaḍaṁ . Ā grāmada poṟavoḷala visthāraventeṁdaḍe . vri . baḷasida gaṁdhasāḷiya sukāḷi
(gaḷi)gaḷiṁcaradiṁde naṁdanāvaḷi taḷta kōkilaravaṁgaḷinudghasugaṁdhapuṟpasaṁkuḷadoḷu baṁḍanuṁ ḍu noredāṇati
yva madāḷigēyadiṁ viḷasitamāgi pūvinapaḍaṁgile sēbyamiḷātaḷāgradoḷu . ka . saudhada maṇibhavanaṁ
gaḷa dīdhitigaḷgaḷkī poṟagaḷupavanamidu nirvvāditavidinaraśmigasādhitaveṁdirppudilli karttale vanadoḷū .
sarasijaṣaṁḍadiṁ lateya maṁṭapadiṁ sahakāralakṣmiyiṁ suramahījātadiṁ misupa caṁdanadiṁdelevaḷḷiyiṁ niraṁtara
vesadirppa pūgavanadiṁ navadinavacaṁpakalīleyiṁ manōharamenisirdda pūvinapaḍaṁgi levoppuvudāvakālamuṁ .
bhūnutapāvane negaḷda dakṣiṇagaṁgeyenippa tuṁgabhadrānadi vāraṇāsipura puḻpapaḍaṁgile visvanāthanuṁ
śrīnikhiḷāmarārccitapadadvayapaṁkajakusmanāthanā stānadoḷirddu pūjipa dharāmararē kritakrityarallarē . śrī
matu paṁkajagarbhbhasaṁbhavakuḷaprakhyātaruṁ rugyadussāmātharvvaṇavēdasāstravidaruṁ śrībyāsavālmīki
visvāmitrādimunīṁdrasaccaritaruṁ nūṟippatirvvargguṇastōmaḷāṁkaraṇaprasiddharesedaru visvaṁbharābhāgadoḷū .
kaṁ . sāraṭṭarittalu muḷidaḍe mārigaḷī pārvvareṁdu kaliyaṁ dēvāgārada paḷavige dūrade bārisuvaṁtirkku
malli vātōddhūtaṁ . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭānajapasamādhisīlaguṇa
saṁpaṁnaruṁ sujanaprasaṁnaruṁ caturvvēdōccāritaghōṣadaśadigupatipā ṇḍiticaturmmukharuṁ duḥkarmmapā
rāmmukharuṁ dēvarisṣipitratarppaṇādivividhahavyakabyaprayōgayōjakaruṁ dvātriṁśatsahasrargghyāgra
pūjitaruṁ rugejussāmātharvvaṇavēdavēdāṁtasakaḷaśsāstrapārāvāratīraprāptamanōcari
traruṁ dvijakuḷapavitraruṁ saptasōmasaṁsthāvabhṛthāvagāhanaparamapavitrīkritaśarīraruṁ bhayalōbhadū
raruṁ Aupāsanāgnihōtradēvadvijagurupūjātatpararuṁ mārtaṁḍōjvaḷakīrttiyutaruṁ yajanayā
janādhyāyanayadhyāpanadānapratigrahasaṭukarmmaniyataruṁ kṛtayugacaritraruṁaghakuḷaṁ
dhakarādi(pa)tyaruṁ traipuruṣabhṛtyaruṁ sakalaguṇābharaṇabhūsitaruṁ satyārjjitasubhāṣita
ruṁ Āsrutajanakalpavṛkṣaruṁ sakaḷadharmmasurakṣitaruṁ krōdhapraśādaśāpānugrahasamarttharuṁ satpu
raṣatīrttharuṁ pratyēkakāryyabruhaspatigaḷuṁ samudeyavācaspatigaḷuṁ ripukuḷakadaḷīvanakuṁjararuṁ
śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararuṁ sakaḷavidyujjanāpanōdigaḷuṁ dānavinōdigaḷuṁ śrīkalidēvasvāmiya
labdhavaraprasādarumappa śrīmadānādiya mahāgrahāraṁ dakṣiṇavāraṇāsi pūvinapaḍaṁgile
ya Aśēsamahājanaṁ nūṟippatibbaru . svasti śrījayābhyudayaścaśakavarṣa 1181 pravartise śrīsēvaṇa
rāya kaṁdhāradēvavarṣa 13 neya kāḷāyuktasaṁvatsarada puśyadamāvāse sōmavāramuttarāyaṇasaṁ
krāṁti sūryyagrahaṇa vyatīpātayōga kūḍidagaṇyapu(ṁ)ṇyadinadoḷu śrīkusmanātha
dēvara śrīpādapadmaṁgaḷa saṁnidhānadalu śrīmadūroḍeyapramukha Aśēṣamahāja
naṁ nūṟippatibbaruṁ dēvara raṁgabhōga naivēdya khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakeṁdu grāmadiṁ mūḍalu sōmanā
thadēvara kariyaḍaketōṁṭadiṁ baḍagalu cōḷidōṁṭadiṁ mūḍalu haḷḷadiṁ teṁkalu Ūroḍedōṭa kaṁba
520 śrīmānya . hulleyatevaralabbeyanavara keyiṁ mūḍalu kēriya Eṟakanavara keyiṁ teṁkalu bhā
skaranavara keyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu mattaru 12 śrīmānya . baṭamagoḷana kāluveyiṁ paḍuvalu habbeyanā
yakana keyiṁ teṁkalu kārttigēyadēvara keyiṁ baḍagalu mattaru 7 śrīmānya . mālegāṟara maneheṁ
ḍati gulugauve hodaryyamogeyalli bhīmanāthadēvara kayiṁ baḍagalu haḷḷadiṁ paḍuvalu mattaru 6 śrī
mānya . Ajjaragoḷadiṁ baḍagalu muṁnina hiriyamānyada keyiṁ paḍuvalu mattaru 6 kaṁba 450 śrīmā
nya mataṁ Aṁkimageyiṁ teṁkalu sēnabōva rāmayyanavara keyiṁ baḍagalu yinnesaṟiṁ mattaru 3 mā
nya . paḍuvaṇa bayala saṁkharadēvaragaddeya haḷḷadiṁ teṁkalu gaddemattaru 3 śrīmānya . vūrabaḍagase
yi voḷakeya haḷḷadiṁ baḍagalu bhāskararavāra tōṭadiṁ mūḍalu bhōgabhaṭadēvara tōṁṭadiṁ teṁkalu yi
bbaḍagalu kaṁba 400 śrīmānya . kaṭeyiṁ mūḍalu vōṇiya tippayaniṁ teṁkalu gadde kaṁba 400 śrīmānya mū
ḍaṇa bayalalli hirēvōṇiyiṁ baḍagalu kalidēvariṁ paḍuvalu miḍicceya bāyikalliṁ teṁkalu
kōḍiya gōviṁdaśaṇaṁgiIṁ mūḍalu gadde mattaru 1 śrīmānya mattaṁ Ā bayalalli rebbaladēviya kēsavadēvara ga
ddeyiṁ mūḍalu kōṭiya saṁkalayyaniṁ teṁkalu lakaṇaghaiśagaddeyiṁ paḍuvalu miḍicceya bāyikalliṁ
baḍakalu gadde mattaru 1 kaṁ 100 śrīmānya . baṭeyadōṁṭadiṁ paḍuvalu mūḍa baṁdakraviṁtaravara bāyikalliṁ
baḍagalu kaṁba 400 śrīmānya . basadiyakēriya mūḍaṇakaḍeya Asagaramaneyiṁ paḍuvalu teṁkavāgi
la mane kai 8 śrīmānya . Ūravoḷagaṇa Akeyadēvagorādoḷage kallidēvaru yyōgēsvaradēvaru bīra
nāthadēvaru kusmanāthadēvaru caturbhbhāgadoḷage voṁdaneya bhāga yī dēvarige śrīmānya . hittila
kēriya Uttarēsvaradēvara bāḷoḷu hūdōṭadiṁ paḍuvalu teṁkavāgila mane kai 10 . śrīmānya . mattaṁ
Alliṁ mogeyidirāgi hugilārarāmayana maneyiṁ mūḍalu baḍagabāgila mane kai 7 śrī
Uramuṁdaṇa haṁpanakeṟege hōda dāriyiṁ teṁkalu mallikārjunadēvara hūdōṁṭadiṁ paḍavalu praḷaya
da vāsudēvariṁ baḍagalu mālegāṟara maniṁ mūḍalu hūdōṁṭa mattaru 1 kaṁba 100 śrīmānya
Ūraḍageṟeya Ēriyiṁdaṁ mūḍaluvā jinanāthadēvara tōṭadiṁ baḍagalu śaṁkeya basavana tōṁṭadiṁ paḍuvalu
boppayyana tōṭadiṁ śrīmānya .
Digital edition of SII 9.371 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
